instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Heat olive oil in a wide pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add crushed tomatoes, season with salt and pepper, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Drain pasta and toss with the sauce, adding pasta water as needed.
Finish with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil.
prep_ahead: Make the tomato sauce up to 3 days ahead — it improves with time.
Garlic can be minced the day before and stored in a small jar with oil.
